comments.author: Steve
comments.text: Perfectly described! BTW this is behavior that an agent can mimic quite effectively. This is an ANALYTICAL process for humans, even though it's instinctual and natural for us. We problem-solve "spatially" but it's easy to observe the outcomes and mimic it with simple rules of geometry. This is also why we do critter games and lab-rat studies. You don't need to know what's going on in my head at all times. If I do it repeatedly, that's a pattern that you should just mimic.
